title: SQL queries with limit and offset clauses are unable to use bind parameters for either
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT);
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL);
key_bug_features: Limit and offset clauses cannot use bind parameters
